summary: Commerce MCP Studio 0.1.2: faster connect, website refresh, and VSIX packaging fixes.

introduced: Self-hosted VSIX distribution with GCS, Firestore registry API, and marketing website
Automatic update checks via the CT MCP registry (Sparkle-style feed for VS Code)
changed: Marketing website expanded with feature showcases and VS Code install guide
Tracked deploy pipeline for extension, registry API, and website
fixed: Faster first connect by bundling Commerce MCP with the extension
VSIX packaging, logo, and publisher branding
Deploy runner no longer skips when trigger leaves status queued
